reviews.comment:
Muy linda estación de servicio. La atención fue excelente. La persona que nos atendió estuvo muy gentil.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice gas station. The service was excellent. The person who served us was very kind.

reviews.comment:
A mejorar la entrada de autos,  tenés que hacer fila en la calle si hay muchos autos y la onda de los playeros que siempre parecen estar agotados, de forma que de mala gana te cargan combustible.

(Translated by Google)
To improve the car entrance, you have to wait in line on the street if there are a lot of cars, and the beach bums always seem to be exhausted, so they reluctantly fill up your gas tank.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbDY2bVVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lavar el auto $450 es medio caro pero la verdad que es seguro, confiable, atienden bien, lo deja bajo techo, los buscas cuando querés. 👍

(Translated by Google)
Washing your car for $450 is a bit pricey, but it's safe, reliable, the service is good, they keep your car under cover, and you can pick them up whenever you want. 👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbDVxZUtREAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene de bueno el doble ingreso, tanto por Av Colón como por una calle paralela con surtidores separados. Y un minimercado bien provisto.

(Translated by Google)
The advantage is its dual entrance, both from Av Colón and a parallel street with separate gas stations. And it also has a well-stocked convenience store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbC1MeUV3EAE
